theme: Volume, network, debug — ma'lumot saqlash va ulanish (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Volume yarat
tasks.why: Volume — konteyner o'chsa ham qoladigan doimiy ma'lumot ombori.
steps: Nomli volume yarat:  docker volume create d17vol

tasks.title: Tarmoqlarni ko'r
tasks.why: Docker tarmoqlari: default 'bridge' va o'zing yaratganlaring.

tasks.title: Bind mount (host papka)
tasks.why: Bind mount — host papkasini konteynerга ulaydi; fayl ikkalasида ko'rinadi.
steps: Tekshir:  cat data/f.txt   (konteyner yozdi, host ko'ryapti!)

tasks.title: Tarmoq yarat
tasks.why: User-network — konteynerlar nom bilan topishishi uchun.

tasks.title: Ma'lumot saqlanadi (persist)
tasks.why: Volume kuchi: konteyner o'chsa ham ma'lumot qoladi.
steps: 1-konteyner volume'ga yozadi:  docker run --rm -v d17vol:/data alpine sh -c 'echo saqlandi > /data/x.txt'
2-konteyner (boshqa!) o'qiydi:  docker run --rm -v d17vol:/data alpine cat /data/x.txt > persist.txt

tasks.title: Nom bilan ulanish
tasks.why: Bitta tarmoqдagi konteynerlar bir-birini NOM bilan topadi (DNS).
steps: Bitta konteyner ishga tushir:  docker run -d --name d17a --network d17net alpine sleep 600
Boshqasidan unга ping:  docker run --rm --network d17net alpine ping -c1 -W2 d17a > ping.txt 2>&1

tasks.title: Port ochish (-p)
steps: Nginx'ni 8099 portда ishga tushir:  docker run -d --name d17web -p 8099:80 nginx:alpine

tasks.title: Inspect (IP/ma'lumot)
tasks.why: docker inspect — konteyner haqida to'liq ma'lumot (IP, mount...).

tasks.title: Resurs iste'moli (stats)
tasks.why: docker stats — konteynerlar CPU/RAM iste'molini ko'rsatadi.

tasks.title: Day-8 skript + volume
tasks.why: Day-8 bash + bugungi bind mount: skript konteyner orqali host'ga fayl yozadi.
steps: cb/save.sh yoz:  mkdir -p cbout; docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/cbout":/o alpine sh -c 'echo skript-natija > /o/r.txt'

tasks.title: Day-4 grep + inspect
tasks.why: Day-4 grep: inspect natijasидан konteyner IP sini ajrat.
steps: docker inspect d17a | grep -i '"IPAddress"' | head -1 > cb/ip.txt

tasks.title: Doimiy ma'lumot
steps: docker run --rm -v d17vol:/d alpine sh -c 'echo loyiha-data > /d/app.txt'
O'qib saqla:  docker run --rm -v d17vol:/d alpine cat /d/app.txt > stack/data.txt

tasks.title: Ikki konteyner ulanishi
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: 'db' va 'app' bir tarmoqда — app db'ni nom bilan topadi.
steps: docker run -d --name d17db --network d17net alpine sleep 600
docker run --rm --network d17net alpine ping -c1 -W2 d17db > stack/net.txt 2>&1
tasks.expect: stack/net.txt — db ga nom bilan ulandi

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: Volume nima uchun kerakligini + bir tarmoqдagi konteynerlar bir-birini qanday topishini ustozга ayt
